ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) PAUL SARMIENTO, SR. COLLECTIONS OFFICER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-27-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PAUL SARMIENTO, SR. COLLECTDIONS OFFICER . DEFENDANT UPTOWN RESIDENCES LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: AARON GRUBER;
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-12-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $137.50 AS TO DEFENDANT UPTOWN RESIDENCES LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-27-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-27-2026 BY MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UPTOWN RESIDENCES LLC IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UPTOWN RESIDENCES LLC $1,969.50 PRINCIPAL, $137.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,107.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
